P0: web browser acceptance when Web user-visible behavior changes
P1: affected module, integration, system, API, data-flow, or cross-boundary checks
risk assessment when a P1 check is skipped
P2: broader regression, repeated runs, cross-browser or mobile viewport, accessibility, or performance hardening
explicit defer reason when not run

required_evidence: screenshot, trace, video, log, or explicit skip reason
web_acceptance_policy.default_tool_boundary: Use webapp-testing for one-off local acceptance; use e2e-testing only for durable Playwright suites.
web_acceptance_policy.safety_boundary: Do not use production accounts, real payments, or external writes unless explicitly approved.

worktree_policy.write_task_isolation: Use one git worktree or branch per write task.
worktree_policy.code_organization: Keep source code organized by project architecture, not by agent task folders.
